title: Driver was rude and took a wrong route
description: The driver was very rude when I asked about the route and ended up taking a longer path, charging me extra.

title: Driver was speeding throughout the trip
description: The driver exceeded speed limits repeatedly and didn't respond to my requests to slow down.

title: Was charged twice for the same ride
description: My card was charged twice and I can't get a refund.
resolution: Duplicate payment reversed and refund issued within 3 business days.

title: Driver cancelled last minute without notice
description: Driver cancelled 5 minutes before pickup, leaving me stranded.
resolution: Compensation credit of 5 TND applied to passenger account.

title: Driver never showed up
description: Waited 20 minutes but driver never arrived and didn't respond to messages.

title: Passenger was disrespectful and left trash in car
description: Passenger was rude throughout the trip and left the car messy.

title: Driver took a much longer route
description: GPS distance was 8km but we drove 15km, clearly taking a longer route.

title: Car was in terrible condition, AC broken
description: The vehicle was dirty and the air conditioning wasn't working during a hot day.
